module.name: freebox
module.description: Free-floating box you can move, resize and rotate directly on the preview (Edit layout mode).
module.aiSpec:
A FREELY POSITIONED CONTAINER. It flows normally in the slide until you drag, resize or rotate it on the preview in "Edit layout" mode — or you can pre-place it with x/y/ w/h args. Use it to drop a caption, badge, image or paragraph anywhere on a slide.
Body: a single section of ordinary Markdown, shown inside the box. `halign`/`valign` control how that content sits within the box.
Placement args (written back automatically when you drag on the preview; you can also set them by hand): `x`/`y` = center position as a percent of the slide, `w`/`h` = size as a percent, `rot` = rotation in degrees. Omit them to let the box flow inline.
When NOT to use: for normal slide flow just write Markdown; for a titled callout box use a card/callout module instead.
Parameters: - `bg` : background color/fill. Default transparent. Any CSS color. - `border` : CSS border shorthand, e.g. `1px solid #ccc`. Default `0` (none). - `halign` : left | center | right — horizontal text alignment. Default center. - `valign` : top | middle | bottom — vertical placement of the content. Default middle. - `textcolor` : text color inside the box. Default blank = inherit. Any CSS color. - `radius` : corner radius in px. Default 6. Range 0–200. - `padding` : inner padding in px. Default 0. Range 0–400. - `shadow` : true/false — drop shadow around the box. Default false.
<!-- @freebox x: 50, y: 40, w: 40, h: 20, bg: #111, textcolor: #fff, padding: 12, shadow: true --> Positioned box <!-- @end -->

param.name: halign
param.label: Horizontal Align
param.desc: Horizontal text alignment inside the box.

param.name: valign
param.label: Vertical Align
param.desc: Vertical placement of the content inside the box.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Text color inside the box; blank = inherit.

param.name: shadow
param.label: Shadow
param.desc: Draw a drop shadow around the box.

snippet.label: Free box
snippet.description: A box that flows normally until you move/resize/rotate it on the preview.

snippet.label: Free box (placed)
snippet.text: <!-- @freebox x: 50, y: 40, w: 40, h: 20, halign: center, valign: middle --> Positioned box <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: A free box pre-placed at the centre. halign: left|center|right, valign: top|middle|bottom.
